Package com.monkey.mcbot.api.model

Class BotSpawnRequest.Builder

java.lang.Object
com.monkey.mcbot.api.model.BotSpawnRequest.Builder
Enclosing class:
BotSpawnRequest
public static final class BotSpawnRequest.Builder extends Object
Builder for BotSpawnRequest.

  • Method Details

    • owner

      public BotSpawnRequest.Builder owner(UUID ownerUUID)
      Sets the primary owner UUID.
      Parameters:
      ownerUUID - primary owner
      Returns:
      current builder

    • target

      public BotSpawnRequest.Builder target(UUID targetUUID)
      Replaces current targets with a single target UUID.
      Parameters:
      targetUUID - target UUID (null clears targets)
      Returns:
      current builder

    • addTarget

      public BotSpawnRequest.Builder addTarget(UUID targetUUID)
      Adds a single target UUID to the current target set.
      Parameters:
      targetUUID - target UUID
      Returns:
      current builder

    • targets

      public BotSpawnRequest.Builder targets(Collection<UUID> targets)
      Replaces all current targets using the provided collection.

      Null entries are ignored.

      Parameters:
      targets - target collection
      Returns:
      current builder

    • addTeamOwner

      public BotSpawnRequest.Builder addTeamOwner(UUID teamOwnerUUID)
      Adds a TEAM_ALLY owner UUID.
      Parameters:
      teamOwnerUUID - owner UUID
      Returns:
      current builder

    • teamOwners

      public BotSpawnRequest.Builder teamOwners(Collection<UUID> owners)
      Replaces TEAM_ALLY owners using the provided collection.

      Null entries are ignored.

      Parameters:
      owners - owner collection
      Returns:
      current builder

    • settings

      public BotSpawnRequest.Builder settings(BotSettings settings)
      Sets required bot settings.
      Parameters:
      settings - spawn settings
      Returns:
      current builder

    • build

      public BotSpawnRequest build()
      Builds an immutable spawn request after validating mode constraints.

      Validation rules include: owner requirement for SINGLE and ALLY modes, TEAM_ALLY owner presence, non-null settings, and SINGLE mode target auto-forcing to owner.

      Returns:
      immutable spawn request
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - when required data is missing or invalid for the mode
